name: Cloudkill
description: You create a 20-foot-radius Sphere of poisonous, yellow-green fog centered on a point you choose within range. The fog spreads around corners. It lasts for the duration or until strong wind disperses the fog, ending the spell. Its area is Heavily Obscured. A creature takes 5d8 Poison damage when it enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there. At the start of each of your turns after the spell is cast, the fog moves 10 feet away from you. When using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5.
